title: STOP Using Claude to Code. Do THIS Instead.
summary: Austin Marchese argues that Claude should be used not just for coding but as the foundation for a personal AI operating system that learns user workflows and compounds in capability over time. He advocates for treating AI as owned infrastructure rather than rented services.
